sql_array: CREATE TABLE sales (id INTEGER, product_id INTEGER, price DOUBLE, quantity INTEGER);
INSERT INTO sales (id, product_id, price, quantity) VALUES (1, 101, 20.0, 5), (2, 102, 15.0, 3), (3, 101, 25.0, 2);
UPDATE sales SET price = price * 0.9 WHERE product_id = 101;
SELECT regr_avgy(price, quantity) AS avg_price_per_quantity FROM sales;
SELECT product_id, regr_avgy(price, quantity) AS avg_price FROM sales GROUP BY product_id;
